examples: His affability conduces to success as a salesman.
People still argue about whether Mr Medvedev's affability was sincere, or a stunt.
Lady Catherine was reckoned proud by many people he knew, but he had never seen anything but affability in her.
His easy affability and soulful empathy (genuine or faked) score big on the tube.
Andrew Rosen also picked up his father's affability, although it's a more low-key, less rambunctious version.
